mapper.sql: a.id, a.name, a.admin_flag AS "adminFlag", a.enable_flag AS "enableFlag", a.priority, a.remarks, a.create_date AS "createDate", a.create_by AS "createUserId", a.update_date AS "updateDate", a.update_by AS "updateUserId", a.del_flag AS "delFlag"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role(id, name, admin_flag, enable_flag, priority, remarks, create_date, create_by, update_date, update_by, del_flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{adminFlag}, #{enableFlag}, #{priority}, #{remarks}, #{createDate}, #{createUserId}, #{updateDate}, #{updateUserId}, #{delFlag})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role SET name = #{name}, admin_flag = #{adminFlag}, enable_flag = #{enableFlag}, priority = #{priority}, remarks = #{remarks}, update_date = #{updateDate}, update_by = #{updateUserId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_role_menu(role_id, menu_id)
SELECT #{id}, #{menuId} FROM dual

INSERT INTO sys_user_role(role_id, user_id)
SELECT #{role.id}, #{userId} FROM dual
